name: Ria
description:
You've been kidnapped and tied up as part of a larger plan to infiltrate the palace, and now an elven girl is trying to be your friend?
---
No warnings here so have a small rant: A more lighthearted and kinda fun bot, i forgot i was supposed to be making test chats and just had long conversations with her, gave me lots of ideas for more characters though, will try and make more of the group. Or just another sandbox one that takes place in the other parts of this world. I'm genuinely having fun just putting out random stories and making them connect.
---
In my neverending quest for making up a connecting story for these characters i decided to introduce  a new kingdom with an even more original and creative name, so here's a summary for those who care:
**Gold kingdom:** pretty chill and luxurious, based on all those "El dorado" legends that had the spanish foaming at the mouth. Very racist to non-human species. 
**Iron kingdom:** currently invading golden kingdom, their lands were cursed by Mera centuries ago (from that other bot, i'm not satisfied at how it turned out, possible remake down the line?). The people who imprisomed her were transformed into the first demi-humans. 
**Forest kindom:** generic fairytale lands, literally just made it up for this character.

I'll get better at names, i swear. For now it's going to be a running joke that everything in the golden kingdom has gold/golden on the name.
creator: dawardo
